incident: v4/v5 died 3x — parallel restarts, blind logs, no checkpoint

mac_guard.note: Real-time RAM · CPU · GPU/SoC thermal · disk · queue zombies — same UI founder sees

R1_one_render_at_a_time.law: Exactly ONE commercial film render globally (WitnessBC OR SourceA OR avatar mux heavy job)

R2_ram_gate.law: Do not start capture if free RAM below minimum

R3_full_logging.law: Every render tees stdout+stderr to lane log — never silent python

R4_checkpoint_after_concat.law: After commercial-short-raw.mp4 exists, write checkpoint.json before polish

R5_no_auto_restart.law: Agents must status-check before starting render; never launch second PID

R6_separate_work_dirs.law: v4/v5/avatar use distinct work_dir in beats publish block — no shared rmtree fights

R8_force_only.law: --force or COMMERCIAL_FILM_FORCE=1 required to break lock or wipe checkpoint work dir

R9_mac_guard_ssot.law: Film factory reads Mac Health Guard live API before acquire; fallback to mac_health_guard._machine_pressure

R10_cpu_gate.law: Do not start heavy capture if CPU load >= max_cpu_pct

R11_disk_gate.law: Do not start if root disk >= max_disk_pct

R12_gpu_thermal_gate.law: Warn on SoC thermal pressure; block if thermal_pressure + memory critical
R12_gpu_thermal_gate.note: Apple Silicon GPU shares die — pmset therm + gpu_note in machine_pressure

R13_zombie_gate.law: Block if queue_zombies >= max or ghost_terminals >= max

R14_metrics_log.law: Every acquire · checkpoint · release appends to render metrics jsonl

R15_lane_publish_isolation.law: WitnessBC / avatar lanes must NEVER publish to SourceA OUT_LANDING (commercial-short-demo.mp4)
R15_lane_publish_isolation.incident: witnessbc v5 finish overwrote SourceA site asset 2026-06-15

R16_critic_circle_before_render.law: No commercial film render while critic circle freeze ON — Playwright heroes blocked from public ship
R16_critic_circle_before_render.until: Screen Studio Grade A master + critic PASS

founder_commands.mac_guard_ui: open http://127.0.0.1:13024/  # or Mac Health Guard.app
